```{r Validation rule 7: sepsis event not completed on completed enrolment/end}
problems <- problems |>
  dplyr::bind_rows(
    data$enrollments |>
      dplyr::select("patient_key", "enrollment_key",
        "enrollment_status" = "status") |>
      dplyr::left_join(
        data$events |>
          dplyr::filter(.data$event_type_key == "end") |>
          dplyr::select("enrollment_key", "end_status" = "status"),
        dplyr::join_by("enrollment_key")) |>
      dplyr::inner_join(
        data$events |>
          dplyr::filter(.data$event_type_key == "bsi" &
                        .data$status != "COMPLETED") |>
          dplyr::select("enrollment_key", "event_key",
            "bsi_status" = "status"),
        dplyr::join_by("enrollment_key")) |>
      dplyr::filter(.data$enrollment_status == "COMPLETED" |
                    .data$end_status == "COMPLETED") |>
      dplyr::anti_join(
        exceptions |> dplyr::filter(.data$rule_id == 7L),
        dplyr::join_by("event_key")) |>
      tidyr::nest(context = c("enrollment_status", "end_status", "bsi_status")) |>
      dplyr::mutate(
        rule_id        = 7L,
        patient_key    = .data$patient_key,
        enrollment_key = .data$enrollment_key,
        event_key      = .data$event_key,
        context        = .data$context,
        .keep = "none"))
```
